overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban downtown. The player character walks along distinctive orange-textured sidewalks past futuristic vehicles and neon signage, passing through a security checkpoint and under concrete overpasses in a dense cyberpunk cityscape with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: beginning walk at city intersection crosswalk with futuristic traffic
futuristic sedan with bright headlights drives past on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange sidewalk next to a busy street with futuristic vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street with headlights illuminated

tall industrial pole with multiple light fixtures illuminating the street below
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying a face on the building facade
towering high-rise building with illuminated windows rising above the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with the camera walking forward along an distinctive orange-textured sidewalk. Futuristic vehicles with bright headlights drive past on the right, while tall glass skyscrapers and digital billboards tower overhead. The street is moderately busy with sparse pedestrian traffic walking in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with metal detector gates

events.description: approaching and entering the security checkpoint structure with metal gates
passing through the metal detector gate with red light strips

agents.ego_description: walking through a security checkpoint with metal detector frames and red glowing barrier lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking ahead through the checkpoint gate

entered.detail: metal framework with vertical red light strips forming a security checkpoint
black metal barrier fencing running along the left side of the walkway
horizontal blue neon lighting running along the building wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow security checkpoint area with metal detector gates featuring vertical red light strips. The camera passes through the checkpoint following a pedestrian in a green shirt, with blue neon strips illuminating the left wall and metal fencing lining the walkway. The sky becomes mostly blocked by overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overhead structures

events.description: entering covered walkway section with building overhangs and parked vehicles
passing line of parked futuristic cars on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered corridor with neon lighting, passing other pedestrians and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink vest and jeans walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: overhead building structure creating a covered corridor over the pedestrian path
bright yellow futuristic sports car parked along the left curb
tall vertical digital advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking through a semi-covered pedestrian walkway with overhead building structures providing shelter. The path passes parked futuristic vehicles including a distinctive yellow sports car on the left. Neon lighting continues to illuminate the corridor as the camera follows a pedestrian in a pink vest, with digital billboards visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath highway overpass with scattered debris

events.description: entering underpass area beneath large concrete overpass with reduced lighting
area with scattered papers and litter visible across the orange sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through an underpass with scattered trash, passing groups of pedestrians in a denser crowd

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a tunnel-like environment overhead
litter and paper debris scattered across the orange sidewalk surface
large orange utility vehicle parked on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through an underpass beneath a massive concrete overpass, creating a tunnel-like environment with artificial lighting. The orange sidewalk is littered with scattered papers and debris. The crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians walking in various directions, while a large utility truck is visible on the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic downtown at night, moving from an open city intersection into increasingly enclosed urban corridors. It begins by walking along a distinctive orange-textured sidewalk beneath towering glass skyscrapers and digital billboards as futuristic vehicles stream past. As the camera advances, the open street narrows into a security checkpoint defined by metal detector gates with red light strips and blue neon walls, while overhead structures begin to block out the sky. The scene then shifts into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway, passing a parked yellow sports car and following a pedestrian in a pink vest under the glow of neon signage. Finally, the path leads beneath a massive concrete overpass into a tunnel-like environment where the orange sidewalk is littered with debris and the crowd density increases around a large utility truck.
